update.author: Pia Marchetti
update.done_this_week: Discovered a regression in the smoke tests that pushed the merge back.
update.target_next_week: Reduce scope to the top-2 use cases and land a partial fix.
update.blockers: Design review pending from the sibling team.

update.author: Sana Volkov
update.done_this_week: Legal review outstanding — no code path until the sign-off lands.
update.target_next_week: Pick up a related workstream while the primary path stays blocked.
update.blockers: External vendor SLA slipping; no eta.

update.author: Odin Ashby
update.done_this_week: Feature flag is enabled for internal cohorts; watching latency and error rate.
update.target_next_week: Complete the final code review and enable the feature flag globally.

update.done_this_week: Shipped the last remaining PR and confirmed the target metric moved as expected.
update.target_next_week: Monitor for the next 2 weeks; no active work planned.

update.done_this_week: Closed the final ticket in the epic and archived the working doc.
update.target_next_week: Move to maintenance; capture learnings into the runbook.

update.done_this_week: Feature flag is enabled for internal cohorts; watching latency and error rate.
update.target_next_week: Ship remaining PRs; start canary rollout by Wednesday.
